/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/voxel_sandbox.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/voxel_sandbox.dir/src/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/voxel_sandbox.dir/src/World.cpp.o CMakeFiles/voxel_sandbox.dir/src/Chunk.cpp.o CMakeFiles/voxel_sandbox.dir/src/MeshBuilder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/voxel_sandbox.dir/src/Camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/voxel_sandbox.dir/src/Raycast.cpp.o CMakeFiles/voxel_sandbox.dir/src/Entity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/voxel_sandbox.dir/src/EntityManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/voxel_sandbox.dir/src/Mob.cpp.o -o voxel_sandbox  _deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a _deps/glad-build/libglad.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lm -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
